examples: Here you can see a falconry hawk, fat in the moult, still eager to be flying and working.
Mature Christmas Island red crabs probably moult only once a year, as their growth rate slows.
You should make moult treatment, especially for armpit so that the dress on the bride could show the brilliant effect.
Over the past month, the periodical cicadas of Brood XIII, native to the area, have crawled up roots, through the earth's surface and onto tree trunks everywhere, to moult and spread wings.
They normally moult in a colony.
